issues.description: The inline discoverRoots() fix is not fully correct: it treats darwin as inherently case-insensitive, but macOS can use case-sensitive APFS/HFS volumes. On those systems /repo/Project and /repo/project are distinct roots and the new key still collapses one of them, so the findings artifact overstates the item as fixed.
issues.verificationMethod: Verifier (gpt-5-4) read the staged diff of tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/utils/fileSystem.ts and reasoned from the platform-proxy branch (process.platform === 'win32' || 'darwin').
issues.suggestedTestOrCheck: Dedup two case-variant references on a case-insensitive volume collapses to one root; two genuinely distinct case-variant dirs on a case-sensitive volume stay distinct.
issues.resolution_notes: Replaced the OS-name proxy with fs.realpathSync.native as the dedup key (falls back to the resolved path when realpath fails; the existsSync check filters nonexistent targets). Case variants collapse only where the volume itself is case-insensitive; symlinked duplicates dedupe as a bonus. tsc clean; mocha 910 passing.
